title: Brazil
html:
Brazil

Stub. Brazil shows up twice in the May 2025 graduation-aspirational notes: priced as part of a multi-city South America trip in 2025 04 22 south america flight pricing (USA → Colombia → Brazil → USA, $930), and named explicitly as "party in Carnival Brazil" in 2025 05 20 side quests list. Never executed in the corpus — the trip got eaten by the Austin move and the Rankett grind.
